posts.author: nivas_k
posts.text: Introducing Kite MCP: Connect your Kite account to AI assistants — We’ve checked from our end, and Kite MCP is working fine with Claude Desktop. Please try the following troubleshooting steps: 1. Reinstall Claude Desktop Uninstall Claude Desktop completely. Delete the Claude application data: Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude Reinstall the latest version of Claude Desktop. 2. Verify claude_desktop_config Open the claude_desktop_config file. Ensure the Kite MCP server configuration and credentials match exactly as mentioned in the setup documentation/article…

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing the Screener on Kite - beta — ETF and bond-specific data isn’t available right now; we’ll look into adding it in a future update.

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing the Native Option Chain on Kite Web (Beta) — Noted, will check the feasibility. Displaying OI values fully by default is tricky. For instruments with large strike and premium values like Sensex, fitting everything on screen without truncation is a challenge, especially on smaller phones. That said, we will look into making the columns adjust more responsively and check what’s feasible.

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing the Screener on Kite - beta — We’ve been working on a Screener for Kite, and it’s ready for early access. This can now be accessed on the Kite beta portal kite-beta.zerodha.com , and we’d love for you to try it and share your feedback. If you’ve been switching between Kite and other websites for needs like top gainers and losers, 52-week breakouts, low P/E stocks, penny stock lists, gap-up/down scans, and more, that changes now. This was a gap we often heard from you and something we’ve been working to fix for a while. You’ll find the Screener as a sub-tab on the Dashboard , right…
